metadata.title: Renad International Trading — Connecting Global Brands with GCC Markets
metadata.description: Renad International Trading FZCO is a UAE-based distribution partner bringing the world's leading consumer brands to retail networks across Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Oman.

slides.text: At Renad, we don't just move products, we build partnerships. We guide your consumer brands onto the shelves of the GCC's premier retailers and pharmacies, backed by seamless logistics and deep market expertise.
A premium range of innovative capsules, sprays, and sugar-free strips. Renad delivers them seamlessly to leading GCC pharmacies and modern retail.

slides.hi: The Leading Tongue Care Specialist in the GCC
slides.text: The global leader in specialized tongue care solutions. Renad ensures its premium and seamless distribution throughout the GCC.

progress.heading: From the UAE.. Connecting Global Brands to Every GCC Market
progress.description: At Renad, we bridge the gap between global innovations and GCC markets. More than just a logistics provider, we are the trusted partner connecting your brand with the region's premier retail and pharmacy networks. We manage the entire journey to the shelf—from local market insights to strategic distribution, ensuring lasting growth for every brand in our family.

pillars.heading: Built for Your Brand's Growth in the GCC
pillars.subheading: From market entry to the shelf, we combine regional networks, smart logistics, and operational expertise into one trusted partner.

items.label: Market Access
items.desc: Instant reach into established GCC retail and pharmacy networks — no groundwork required.

items.label: Brand Growth
items.desc: Localized positioning and in-market activation that turn shelf space into sell-through.

items.label: Regulatory Compliance
items.desc: Registration, labeling, and import compliance for every market — handled for you.

items.label: Distribution Excellence
items.desc: A unified, reliable supply chain engineered to move your brand from import to shelf.

categories.title: Oral & Dental Care
categories.desc: Innovative and specialized solutions redefining daily oral hygiene with globally trusted brands.

categories.title: Snacks & Confectionery
categories.desc: An emerging, carefully selected category bringing premium and enjoyable snack experiences to GCC markets.

categories.title: Medical & Healthcare Products
categories.desc: A strategic expansion into healthcare and medical essentials to meet growing market demands.

howWeWork.heading: From Global Brand to GCC Consumer
howWeWork.subheading: A unified, end-to-end journey from factory to hands, managed seamlessly by Renad every step of the way.

steps.title: Global Brands
steps.desc: We partner with premium brands, embracing their vision within our portfolio.

steps.title: Import & Registration
steps.desc: We handle product registration, packaging compliance, and customs clearance smoothly.

steps.title: Smart Warehousing
steps.desc: Goods are stored and managed in top-tier compliant regional logistics hubs.

steps.title: Strategic Distribution
steps.desc: Secure and reliable delivery directly to leading retail and pharmacy networks.

steps.title: Retail & Consumer
steps.desc: Products are perfectly positioned on shelves, ready for the GCC shopper.

visionMission.tagline: To be the most trusted gateway connecting global consumer brands with GCC markets.
visionMission.visionText: To make Renad the premier partner for global brands aspiring to build a lasting presence and win consumer trust in the GCC.
visionMission.missionText: To simplify GCC expansion for global brands, managing logistics and distribution to seamlessly reach leading retail and pharmacy networks.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by global brands & GCC retailers

items.quote: Renad gave our brand a real route into the Gulf. Within months we moved from zero presence to consistent shelf space across multiple markets.
items.name: Brand Partner

items.quote: They understand both the regulatory maze and the retail relationships. Rare to find one partner who handles compliance and distribution this well.
items.name: Procurement Lead

items.quote: Professional, executive, and genuinely regional. Renad operates like a partner invested in our long-term growth — not just another distributor.
items.name: Category Director

items.quote: Their regional reach meant our launch covered all six markets at once — scale that would have taken us years to build alone.
items.name: Export Manager

items.quote: Clear reporting, on-time delivery, and a team that knows every buyer. Exactly the partner a growing brand needs in the Gulf.
items.name: Managing Director

aboutPage.title: About Us — Renad International Trading
aboutPage.description: Renad International Trading FZCO is a UAE-based distribution partner connecting international consumer brands with retail networks across the GCC.
aboutPage.heading: Your Brand's Strategic Extension in GCC Markets
aboutPage.subtitle: At Renad, we believe successful distribution stems from deep market insight. From our UAE base, we act as a trusted partner ensuring global consumer brands seamlessly reach the shelves of premier GCC retail and pharmacy networks.
aboutPage.whoWeAreHeading: From Factory to Shelf.. Owning Your Growth in the GCC
aboutPage.whoWeAreP1: Renad is a specialized trading and distribution company dedicated to launching and scaling global consumer brands within GCC markets.
aboutPage.whoWeAreP2: At Renad, we don't treat products as mere cargo; we embrace them as brands whose growth we fully drive. We manage the entire journey, carefully selecting innovative daily essentials and analyzing market insights to ensure perfect alignment.
aboutPage.whoWeAreP3: Our connection to what we distribute is direct and deep. We serve as the official partner behind premium global brands like TUNG for specialized oral care and PaperMints for instant breath freshness. From the moment a product leaves the factory, we handle smart warehousing and logistics, leveraging strong distribution networks to secure a permanent, prominent placement on the shelves of leading pharmacies and retail chains.

contactPage.title: Contact Us — Renad International Trading
contactPage.description: Get in touch with Renad International Trading to bring your consumer brand to retail and pharmacy networks across the GCC.
contactPage.heading: Let's Launch Your Brand in the GCC
contactPage.subtitle: Share your regional expansion goals, and our team will map out the optimal journey to establish your products across the market.
contactPage.formSubtext: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within two business days.

productsPage.title: Products — Renad International Trading
productsPage.description: Explore the brands Renad distributes across the GCC — PaperMints breath care, TUNG tongue care, and more categories coming soon.
productsPage.heading: A Curated Portfolio of Global Brands
productsPage.subtitle: At Renad, we source innovative daily essentials that modern consumers seek. Our portfolio features premier global brands, ensuring their lasting presence on leading retail and pharmacy shelves across the GCC.

productsExplorer.comingSoonNotified: You're on the list! We'll email you the moment this category launches.
productsExplorer.comingSoonText: We're working on launching this category soon. Sign up to be the first to know when products launch.

products.name: PaperMints Strips
products.long: Sugar-free strips that dissolve instantly on the tongue for discreet, on-the-go breath freshness. A pocket-sized icon of oral freshness, distributed by Renad across GCC pharmacies and modern trade.

products.name: PaperMints Drops
products.long: Concentrated mint drops delivering hours of fresh breath in a refillable tin — a premium everyday essential for the modern Gulf consumer.

products.name: PaperMints Spray
products.long: A fine-mist spray for an instant burst of freshness anywhere. Compact, travel-friendly, and registered for retail across all six GCC markets.

products.name: PaperMints Capsules
products.long: Convenient single-dose capsules that release a clean, lasting mint — ideal for impulse pharmacy and checkout placement.

products.name: TUNG Brush
products.long: Ergonomically designed to reach and clean the back of the tongue — the real source of bad breath. The category-defining tool in modern tongue care.

products.name: TUNG Gel
products.long: A purpose-built gel that pairs with the TUNG Brush to neutralize odor and leave a clean, fresh finish. Sold as a system for maximum effect.

products.name: TUNG Fresh Kit
products.long: The full TUNG system — brush plus gel — packaged for retail and education. The simplest way to bring tongue care to a new market.
